---
title: "Pediatric HIV Care Dashboard"
author: Elvis Safary
format:
    dashboard:
        embed-resources: true
        orientation: rows
theme: flatly
execute:
    echo: false
    warning: false
---

<style>
.value-box-value { font-size: 1.2rem !important; }
.value-box-title { font-size: 0.8rem !important; }
</style>

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px
import itables.options as opt
from itables import show

# load data
ped_hiv = pd.read_csv('yaounde_ped_hiv_survey.csv')

# Rename sex
ped_hiv['sex'] = ped_hiv['sex'].map({'m': 'Male', 'f': 'Female'})

# data cleaning
ped_hiv['disease_past_month'] = ped_hiv['disease_past_month'].str.replace(r'\s+', ' ', regex=True).str.strip().str.title()

# handle missing values in ARV treatment
ped_hiv['arv_treatment'] = ped_hiv['arv_treatment'].fillna('Unknown')

# KPI calculations
total_children = len(ped_hiv)
vit_a_pct = (ped_hiv['vitamin_a_received'] == 'Yes').mean() * 100
most_common_disease = ped_hiv['disease_past_month'].mode()[0]
male_count = len(ped_hiv[ped_hiv['sex'] == 'Male'])
female_count = len(ped_hiv[ped_hiv['sex'] == 'Female'])
# visualizations
# Top 5 diseases
top_diseases = ped_hiv['disease_past_month'].value_counts().nlargest(5).reset_index()

#
fig_diseases = px.bar(top_diseases,     x='count', y='disease_past_month',orientation='h', title="Top 5 Reported Illnesses", labels={'count': 'Number of Cases', 'disease_past_month': 'Illness'}, 
color='disease_past_month',     color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Vivid)

fig_diseases.update_layout(  showlegend=False,   template="plotly_white", yaxis={'categoryorder':'total ascending'})

# gender pie chart
fig_gender = px.pie(ped_hiv, names='sex', title="Gender Representation", color='sex', color_discrete_map={'Male': '#3498db', 'Female': '#e74c3c'}, hole=0.3)

fig_gender.update_traces(textposition='inside', textinfo='percent+label')

fig_gender.update_layout(showlegend=False)

# health area clustered by Vitamin A
fig_health_vit = px.histogram(ped_hiv, x="health_area_name", color="vitamin_a_received",             barmode="group", title="Vitamin A Supplementation by Health Area",        labels={'health_area_name': 'Health Area', 'vitamin_a_received': 'Received Vit A'})

# ARV regimen by sex
fig_arv = px.bar(ped_hiv, x='arv_treatment', color='sex', title="ARV Regimen by Sex",             barmode='group', labels={'arv_treatment': 'ARV Regimen', 'sex': 'Gender'},               color_discrete_map={'Male': '#457b9d', 'Female': '#e74c3c'})

# Count feeding modes
feeding_counts = ped_hiv['feeding_mode'].value_counts().reset_index()
feeding_counts.columns = ['feeding_mode', 'count']

fig_feeding = px.bar(feeding_counts,    y='feeding_mode', x='count',   orientation='h', title="Distribution of Feeding Modes", text='count',   color='feeding_mode',    color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Safe)

fig_feeding.update_layout(   showlegend=False, yaxis={'categoryorder': 'total ascending'}, yaxis_title="", xaxis_title="")

# ARV regimen by sex
fig_arv = px.bar(ped_hiv, x='arv_treatment', color='sex', title="ARV Regimen by Sex",                barmode='group', labels={'arv_treatment': 'ARV Regimen', 'sex': 'Gender'},                color_discrete_map={'m': '#3498db', 'f': '#e74c3c'})

# water hygiene frequency
hygiene_order = ["Before each refill", "At least once a day", "At least once a week", "At least once a month", "Never"]

fig_hygiene = px.bar(ped_hiv['water_container_washing_freq'].value_counts().reindex(hygiene_order).reset_index(), x='count',y='water_container_washing_freq', orientation='h',                  title="Water Container Washing Frequency", labels={'count': 'Caregivers', 'water_container_washing_freq': 'Frequency'},color='water_container_washing_freq',      color_discrete_sequence=["#1a9850", "#91cf60", "#fee08b", "#fc8d59", "#d73027"], text_auto=True)

fig_hygiene.update_layout(   showlegend=False, yaxis_title=None,    template="plotly_white")

```

# Home
## Row {height="15%"}

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Total Children"
dict(icon="people", color="#457b9d", value=total_children)
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Vitamin A Coverage"
dict(icon="capsule", color="#a8dadc", value=f"{vit_a_pct:.1f}%")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Most Frequent Illness"
dict(icon="thermometer-high", color="warning", value=most_common_disease)
```

## Row 2 {height="85%"}

### {width="60%"}

```{python}
fig_diseases
```

### {width="40%"}

```{python}
fig_gender
```

# Trend
## Row {height="15%"}

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Male Patients"
dict(icon="gender-male", color="info", value=male_count)
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Female Patients"
dict(icon="gender-female", color="danger", value=female_count)
```

## Row {height="85%"}
### column {width="50%"}

```{python}
fig_feeding
```

```{python}
fig_hygiene
```

### column {width="50%"}

```{python}
top_5_list = top_diseases['disease_past_month'].tolist()
filtered_df = ped_hiv[ped_hiv['disease_past_month'].isin(top_5_list)]

fig_area_dis = px.histogram(filtered_df, x="health_area_name", color="disease_past_month",               title="Primary Diseases by Health Area", barmode="stack")
fig_area_dis
```

# Data

```{python}
opt.features = ["paging", "ordering", "info", "buttons"]
show(ped_hiv[['order_number', 'sex', 'health_area_name', 'disease_past_month', 'arv_treatment', 'feeding_mode']], 
     classes="display nowrap compact", buttons=["csv", "excel"])
```
